sections.description: OTLP metric ingestion package that receives OpenTelemetry metrics via gRPC (port 4317) and HTTP (port 4318) endpoints, translates them to Prometheus-compatible format, and stores them via the Appender interface.
sections.purpose: Converts OTLP metric exports into Prometheus samples with configurable transformations. Handles two transport protocols (gRPC and HTTP with protobuf/JSON), metric type mapping (Gauge, Sum, Histogram, ExponentialHistogram, Summary), aggregation temporality (delta-to-cumulative conversion), and label construction from resource/scope/metric attributes.
strengths: Complete OTLP metric type support including ExponentialHistogram and Summary
Configurable metric name sanitization, unit suffix addition, and type suffix (_total) injection
Delta-to-cumulative conversion with TTL-based stale entry eviction (10-minute TTL)
Comprehensive label handling: resource attributes mapping/promotion, scope labels (otel_scope_name/version), and metric attributes
Dual transport support: gRPC (native) and HTTP with automatic protobuf/JSON detection and gzip decompression
Graceful partial success handling with error messages returned to clients
Thread-safe delta accumulation with mutex protection and proper cleanup
Exemplar extraction from OTLP exemplars to Prometheus format (trace_id, span_id, filtered_attributes)
Schema URL support with configurable inclusion as __schema_url__ label
weaknesses: Delta-to-cumulative conversion relies on label set hash for tracking—collision risk is low but not zero
Fixed 10-minute TTL for delta entries not configurable; stale entries only evicted on write operations
HTTP handler maxBodySize is passed per-request, not enforced at construction level
ExponentialHistogram bucket computation depends on scale parameter; edge cases (very large negative scales) may cause precision loss
No built-in metrics/observability on translation failures or partial successes beyond logging
Schema URL handling overwrites across resource/scope levels (scope overrides resource) without explicit precedence documentation
Resource attribute promotion is case-sensitive; no glob patterns or regex matching supported
test_coverage: GRPCHandler: 6 tests covering success, nil/empty requests, partial success, translation errors, and commit failures
HTTPHandler: 9 tests covering protobuf/JSON, gzip compression, malformed payloads, method validation, partial success, and commit errors

Translator: 20+ tests covering gauge (int/double), monotonic/non-monotonic sums, histograms, exponential histograms, summaries, sanitization, unit suffixes, exemplar extraction, delta conversion, schema URLs, resource/scope attribute handling, and edge cases
All tests use t.Parallel(), t.Context(), and moq-generated mocks
Test helpers: recordingAppender (tracks commits/rollbacks/samples), recordedSample type, test config builders
dependencies: go.opentelemetry.io/proto/otlp/common/v1 (OTLP common types: KeyValue, AnyValue, InstrumentationScope)
functionality: GRPCHandler.Export: Receives OTLP metrics via gRPC, coordinates translation, handles commit/rollback, returns partial success responses
HTTPHandler.ServeHTTP: POST /v1/metrics endpoint handling with Content-Type detection (protobuf/JSON), gzip decompression, request validation
Translator.Translate: Main entry point converting ExportMetricsServiceRequest to samples; iterates resource→scope→metric hierarchy
Translator metric type handlers: translateGauge, translateSum, translateHistogram, translateExponentialHistogram, translateSummary each producing type-specific samples
Label building: resourceLabels (LabelMap lookup + Promote filter), scopeLabels (otel_scope_name/version), attribute sanitization
Delta-to-cumulative: accumulateDelta tracks label→cumulative value mapping with TTL; evictStale removes entries older than 10 minutes
Metric name sanitization: converts dots/dashes to underscores, collapses consecutive underscores, handles leading digits, respects colons
Unit/type suffix injection: addUnitSuffix maps unit codes (s→seconds, ms→milliseconds, etc.); addTypeSuffix appends _total to monotonic sums
Exemplar extraction: ExtractExemplars converts OTLP exemplars to Prometheus format with trace_id/span_id hex encoding and filtered_attributes
Error handling: Translates per-metric failures to error returns with sample count; handlers commit partial results when samples > 0
files: interfaces.go: metricsTranslator and metricsStore interfaces; moq code generation directive
grpc.go: GRPCHandler struct, NewGRPCHandler constructor, Export method with transaction semantics
http.go: HTTPHandler struct, NewHTTPHandler constructor, ServeHTTP method with protobuf/JSON/gzip support, readBody and writeResponse helpers
translator.go: Translator struct with Translate method, metric type handlers, label builders, delta tracking, name/label sanitization, exemplar extraction, unit map, comprehensive helper functions
grpc_test.go: 6 tests for GRPCHandler covering success/error paths, uses recordingAppender helper
http_test.go: 9 tests for HTTPHandler covering transport/content-type variants and error paths
translator_test.go: 20+ table-driven tests for metric types, sanitization, delta conversion, exemplars; helper functions and test configuration builders
moq_test.go: Generated mocks for metricsTranslator and metricsStore interfaces
